selected.subject: RE: Anomaly on /api/agents
selected.label: ops
body: Looping in the on-call team. We're seeing the same spike on our side. Suspect window is 14:18–14:24 UTC.
From the logs, planner-alpha did a cache flush at 14:20 and the latency jumped immediately after. Likely the cause but want to confirm with another data point before rolling back.
• error rate held at baseline — no 5xx surge
Going to mute the alert for an hour while we dig in. Will follow up here when we have a fix.
